name: facebook-marketplace-pp-mcp
description: Search, publish, mirror, and manage Facebook Marketplace seller workflows with explicit write checkpoints.

facebook_market_cookies.title: FACEBOOK_MARKET_COOKIES
facebook_market_cookies.description: Optional. Sets FACEBOOK_MARKET_COOKIES for the Facebook Marketplace MCP server.

facebook_market_debug_graphql.title: FACEBOOK_MARKET_DEBUG_GRAPHQL
facebook_market_debug_graphql.description: Optional. Sets FACEBOOK_MARKET_DEBUG_GRAPHQL for the Facebook Marketplace MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.

localappdata.title: LOCALAPPDATA
localappdata.description: Optional. Sets LOCALAPPDATA for the Facebook Marketplace MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.

programfiles.title: PROGRAMFILES
programfiles.description: Optional. Sets PROGRAMFILES for the Facebook Marketplace MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.

programfiles(x86).title: PROGRAMFILES(X86)
programfiles(x86).description: Optional. Sets PROGRAMFILES(X86) for the Facebook Marketplace MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.
